title: Diagnose 2 remaining passive-skill FAILs (session-continuity, digest meta) + skim the 8 WARN reports
current_state: The passive daily digest reports 3 PASS / 8 WARN / 3 FAIL. FAILs: (1) session-continuity - scripts/passive/session_exit_protocol_checker.py produced no report; (2) sprint-readiness - stale cadence, cured by T-251; (3) the digest meta-skill itself FAILs because of the above. The 8 WARNs include tech-debt (288 swallowed exceptions - already ticketed as T-254/T-255/T-264) and memory-pollution (feeds T-266); the rest are unreviewed.
target_state: Root cause of each remaining FAIL identified (stale state vs real bug) and fixed in-ticket if small, otherwise a follow-up ticket filed. All 8 WARN reports skimmed: each either maps to an existing ticket, becomes a new ticket, or is dismissed with a one-line reason. Passive suite target: 0 FAIL, all WARNs triaged.
migration_plan: 1. Run python scripts/passive/session_exit_protocol_checker.py directly; read its output/exit code; determine why no report was generated (crash? stale input? changed path after the app/state.py -> agent/session.py refactor?).
2. Fix if the fix is small and in scripts/passive/ (SAFE component); otherwise file a follow-up ticket with the diagnosis.
3. Read the latest reports in reports/ for the 8 WARN skills; for each: map to existing ticket / new ticket / dismiss with reason.
4. Rerun the digest: expect FAIL count 0 (given T-251 also lands).
risk_notes: The session-continuity checker may be failing because it inspects paths from the pre-refactor layout (app/state.py was archived in this branch) - if so, this is a 5-line path fix in the checker, and it becomes an ideal T-256 sprint candidate (scripts/passive/ is SAFE).
